navigation.description: The depth applied to navigational elements

inline.description: Shadow applied to inline or contextual popups, such as Menus.

sheets.description: Shadow applied to Side or Bottom Sheets

popups.description: Shadow applied to elements that pop-over other UI on the screen, such as Banners, Snackbars, Toast Messages, non-modal Dialogs, and non-modal Side Panels.

modal.description: Shadows that appear modal views that block user interaction. These are paired with a scrim using the $opacity.modal color token.
